TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: truwan Itiniay i Ren'ai Cen no Nantou ko truwan a niyaro', 60 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 167 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 162 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 5 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Seediq81%, Tayal11%, Bunun4%,roma1%.
S.PHON: tro~u~uwan itiniaj i r…ôn °ai ¶…ôn no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u tro~u~uwan a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi***%, taja…ĺ**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%,ro~uma*%.
S.FORM: truwan Itiniay i Ren'ai Cen no Nantou ko truwan a niyaro', 60 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 167 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 162 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 5 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Seediq81%, Tayal11%, Bunun4%,roma1%.
S.PHON: tro~u~uwan itiniaj i r…ôn °ai ¶…ôn no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u tro~u~uwan a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi***%, taja…ĺ**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%,ro~uma*%.
